summary: Full backend and frontend testing of Kido Co-Parenting App MVP. 19/19 backend API tests pass. All core frontend flows work correctly including onboarding, setup-prefs, home, weekends, holidays, chat, and settings.

ui_bugs.issue: Name and phone TextInput fields are missing testID attributes (settings-name-input, settings-phone-input)

issues: shadow* style props deprecated warnings in console (non-blocking, cosmetic)

action_items: Add testID='settings-name-input' and testID='settings-phone-input' to Settings screen TextInput components
Consider replacing deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow for future compatibility
critical_code_review_comments: DB_NAME in .env is 'test_database' not 'kido_app' - server.py defaults to 'kido_app' but env overrides to 'test_database'. This is fine for dev but verify production DB_NAME.
server.py is 541 lines and could be split by domain (routes, models, logic) but it is within acceptable range for MVP
EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL used correctly in api.ts via process.env

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all core flows work; minor: missing testIDs in settings)

seed_data_creation: Created test chains with names prefixed TEST_ during backend tests. Test users created with phones +41791111111, +41792222222, etc.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MVP is fully functional. All backend APIs work (health, chains, invitations, preferences, weekend plans with voting, swiss holidays, holiday wishes, messages/kido chat). Frontend: Welcome→Onboarding→Setup-Prefs→Home→all tabs all working. No blockers found.
